name: Scale AI
h1: Build AI Agents That Work with Scale AI
metaTitle: Build DocsBot AI Agents for Scale AI Workflows
metaDescription: Create DocsBot AI agents that use Scale AI data and workflows for customer support and internal operations with secure actions, testing, and approvals.
intro: Scale AI supports AI-driven operations and project workflows that teams may need to reference, summarize, or act on during customer conversations and internal processes. With DocsBot Skill Builder, you can describe the outcome you want in plain language and have DocsBot create a reusable Skill that lets your AI agent safely look up data, trigger approved actions, and prepare handoffs. This helps support teams and internal operators move from answers alone to AI Actions that resolve issues faster.
supportUseCases: Let a customer-facing DocsBot agent look up Scale AI project or workflow status so it can answer customer questions with current details in chat or ticket replies.
Use a DocsBot support agent to gather missing information from a customer, create a structured handoff, and send the right context into a Scale AI workflow for human review.
Enable the agent to summarize progress, blockers, or next steps from Scale AI records so support teams can provide clearer updates without switching systems.
Have the agent trigger approved follow-up workflows in Scale AI after a customer request, such as escalation routing, review preparation, or internal task creation.
Let the agent prepare ticket summaries that combine the customer conversation with relevant Scale AI context for faster human handoff and resolution.
internalUseCases: Employees can chat with a private DocsBot agent in Slack, Microsoft Teams, or a secure chat interface to retrieve Scale AI project details, workflow status, and operational summaries without opening multiple tools.
Operations teams can ask the agent to collect the latest Scale AI context, summarize open items, and prepare standardized handoff notes for cross-functional review.
Internal teams can use the agent to follow SOPs that gather required information, trigger approved Scale AI workflow steps, and report outcomes back in chat.
Managers can ask the agent to research status across Scale AI activities and generate concise updates for stakeholders, standups, or incident reviews.
Team members can use the agent to capture a request in plain language, have it routed into an approved Scale AI process, and receive a summary of what was submitted and what happens next.
whatYouCanBuild: A support agent that checks Scale AI workflow or project status before replying to customers.
An escalation Skill that gathers customer details and creates a structured Scale AI handoff.
An internal assistant that summarizes active Scale AI records for operations and support teams.
A workflow agent that triggers approved Scale AI actions after manager or policy approval.
A ticket enrichment Skill that combines support conversation history with relevant Scale AI context.
An SOP assistant that guides employees through repeatable Scale AI intake and routing steps.

howItWorks.title: Describe the outcome
howItWorks.description: You tell Skill Builder what you want the agent to do with Scale AI in plain language, such as looking up status, creating handoffs, or triggering an approved workflow during support or internal conversations.

howItWorks.title: Skill Builder designs it
howItWorks.description: Skill Builder turns that request into a safe Skill design, decides what configuration values are needed, and sets up secure connection and authentication handling without exposing credentials in chats or Skill source.

howItWorks.title: Security is built in
howItWorks.description: Skill Builder protects and proxies secrets through secure runtime configuration, scopes access to the minimum records and actions required, and adds approval boundaries wherever updates or sensitive workflow steps need extra control.

howItWorks.title: The Skill is tested
howItWorks.description: DocsBot’s automated testing agent runs imagined customer support and internal team scenarios, finds bugs, unclear instructions, permission gaps, or workflow issues, and feeds those findings into an automated improvement loop.

howItWorks.title: Publish to the right agent
howItWorks.description: Once the Skill is improved and validated, Skill Builder helps deploy it to your customer-facing DocsBot, helpdesk agent, or private team assistant so it can answer questions and take bounded action inside your rules.

faq.question: How can I build an AI agent that works with Scale AI?
faq.answer: With DocsBot Skill Builder, you describe the Scale AI workflow you want in plain language and DocsBot designs the Skill, secures the connection, tests it, and prepares it for deployment. The finished agent can look up information, summarize status, trigger approved actions, and create handoffs based on your rules.

faq.question: Can a DocsBot support agent use Scale AI data during customer conversations?
faq.answer: Yes, a DocsBot support agent can use a Scale AI Skill to retrieve relevant status, workflow context, or record details while responding in a website chat widget or helpdesk ticket flow. You control what data the agent can access and what actions it is allowed to take.

faq.question: What customer support workflows can an AI agent automate with Scale AI?
faq.answer: A DocsBot agent can gather missing customer details, check Scale AI workflow state, prepare escalation notes, create structured handoffs, and trigger approved follow-up steps. This helps support teams resolve issues faster without asking agents to manually jump between systems.

faq.question: Can an internal AI assistant help employees work inside Scale AI?
faq.answer: Yes, employees can chat with a private DocsBot agent to retrieve Scale AI information, summarize project activity, follow SOPs, and complete approved workflow steps from Slack, Microsoft Teams, or a secure internal chat. This reduces tool switching and keeps repeatable work consistent.

faq.question: How does DocsBot keep Scale AI actions secure?
faq.answer: Skill Builder defines the required configuration, stores and proxies secrets securely, keeps credentials out of conversations, and scopes permissions to the minimum necessary access. It can also add approval boundaries for sensitive updates or workflow triggers before the agent takes action.

faq.question: Can I control which Scale AI records or actions the AI agent can use?
faq.answer: Yes, DocsBot Skills are designed with scoped permissions and bounded actions so the agent only accesses the records, users, and workflow steps you approve. This makes it easier to support safe lookups and controlled automation instead of broad unrestricted access.

brand.title: Scale AI
brand.description: Scale AI is a technology‑focused company that delivers AI‑driven solutions while ensuring its online presence runs smoothly through reliable web services. Hosted on WHC, Scale AI offers fast, unlimited web hosting, optimized WordPress hosting with Canadian‑based security, and easy DNS management. Clients can manage their domain, update nameservers, and choose from flexible hosting plans, all backed by WHC’s support. The company combines cutting‑edge artificial intelligence expertise with robust, secure web infrastructure to help customers launch and maintain their digital projects efficiently.
